contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: GAS routing fix + autopilot role default + identity pinning
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/62
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/327
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/326
  
  Details:
  GAS routing + autopilot role default + identity check, 2026-05-29.
  
  Three small but pointed PRs based on autopilot's prod transcripts today.
  
  PRs delivered:
  
  1. truesight_autopilot#62 — AUTOPILOT_DEFAULT_ROLE env var. Gary asked 'requiring me to always indicate the role of autopilot during each start is a pain in the ass.' New default behavior: when the env var is unset (out-of-box default), all new Telegram topics boot straight into 'general' role (no prompt, all tools). Operator can restore the original 1-7 menu by setting AUTOPILOT_DEFAULT_ROLE='' explicitly. Wired into both new-topic call sites in main.py (streaming + JSON endpoints). 6 new tests cover default, explicit override, empty-disables, whitespace/case, alias lookup ('sre' → 'infrastructure'), and unknown-role graceful fallback. 96 tests pass.
  
  2. tokenomics#327 — Bind edgar_send_email_verification.gs to scriptId 1m8IZPs1. Autopilot couldn't find which mirror owned the file because it lacked the standard script.google.com/home/projects/<scriptId>/edit header URL comment. Verified by fingerprint match: the file's distinctive handleEmailVerificationRequest_ function is present in clasp_mirrors/1m8IZPs1.../Code.js and nowhere else. Three more files in the same tdg_identity_management folder still lack header URLs (dao_members_cache_publisher.gs, dapp_permission_change_handler.gs, process_contributor_add_telegram_logs.gs) but their function fingerprints don't match any mirror — meaning those source files have never been clasp-pushed to a GAS project. Operator decides where each lands; bindings can't be auto-verified yet.
  
  3. tokenomics#326 — PR-1h, final missing mirror minted (1zKgMwd6). Already merged earlier in this session.
  
  EC2 deploy held — autopilot still mid-task. Both autopilot PRs sit on main waiting for the next ./scripts/deploy.sh.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
